name: chinese-poetry/chinese-poetry
usage: Primary raw corpus for public-domain Chinese classical poetry text; not treated as a complete recommendation feature database.
known_gaps: No complete recommendation features such as themes, styles, mood, difficulty or suitable contexts.
No user behavior, recommendation logs or embeddings.
No modern annotation/translation layer suitable for direct product use.
Song Ci records use rhythmic/cipai and may not provide a separate title field.
phase1_decision: Use as raw corpus only. Normalize into the project canonical poem schema and enrich features separately.
